case_title: MARY E CHURCHILL VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHURCHILL, MARY E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $32,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $184.11 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,519.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
